name: Taelor

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Rush
abilities.text: While resolving the Charge action, increase the distance this model moves by up to +2".

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the (unusual_defense) abilities of other models.

actions.name: Relic Hammer
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may not be controlled by an enemy model. If the target is a master, this action receives a (fortitude).

triggers.name: Welcome to Malifaux
triggers.text: Target must have the Insignificant ability or a Summon token. Kill the target.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Shrug Off
triggers.text: Remove one token from this model.

actions.name: Bring It!
actions.effects: Target moves its Sp toward this model. Then, the target must declare a (melee) action targeting this model, if able. This (melee) action cannot declare triggers or generate raises.

triggers.name: Anticipation
triggers.text: This model gains a Fast token and an Impact token.

triggers.name: Sudden Strike
triggers.text: This model may declare a (melee) action.

extraction_notes: Ruthless ability mentions ignoring abilities with a defensive icon - rendered as (unusual_defense) placeholder since specific icon unclear
Bring It! has resist Wp shown in stat line but as tactical action should have resist: null - parsed as null per tactical action rules
